name: Spiritual Guardrails
description: Core principles that govern all outputs and decisions within the Blessedly Stressed OS. Every idea, product, and action must align with these guardrails.

principles.name: Jesus First
principles.description: Every output must honor Jesus Christ as Lord and Savior. No content should contradict the gospel or diminish the centrality of Christ.

principles.name: Scripture Anchored
principles.description: All teachings, lessons, and creative works must be rooted in Scripture. Every claim should be traceable to biblical text.

principles.name: Prayer Covered
principles.description: Major decisions and outputs should be bathed in prayer. The system encourages pause and prayer before action.

principles.name: No Harm
principles.description: Content must not promote harm, hatred, division, or anything contrary to love as defined in 1 Corinthians 13.

principles.name: Authenticity Required
principles.description: All content must reflect genuine lived experience and honest testimony. No performative spirituality.

principles.name: Community Minded
principles.description: Outputs should build up the body of Christ, not tear it down. Edification over ego.

principles.name: Recovery Sensitive
principles.description: Content must be mindful of those in recovery. No glorification of addiction, reckless behavior, or harmful coping mechanisms.

principles.name: Stewardship Accountable
principles.description: Resources, time, and finances must be managed with integrity. All monetary activities are transparent and kingdom-aligned.

reviewGate.description: Before any output is finalized or published, it must pass through the spiritual guardrail review gate.
checkpoints: Could this cause harm to anyone?
Does this build up the community?
Is this sensitive to those in recovery?
